title: Allow omitting `parameter` in module parameter port list

features.name: module parameter with type but without parameter keyword
features.description: Code should include a module parameter port list where a parameter is declared with an explicit type but without the `parameter` keyword

features.name: multiple parameters with types without parameter keyword
features.description: Code should include a module parameter port list with multiple parameters declared with explicit types but without the `parameter` keyword

features.name: implicit type parameter without parameter keyword is invalid
features.description: Code should include a module parameter port list with an implicit type specification which is NOT allowed without the `parameter` keyword
